meaning: A hardware device with keys used to type text and commands into a computer.
example: She typed the password using the wireless keyboard.
exampleHindi: उसने वायरलेस कीबोर्ड का उपयोग करके पासवर्ड टाइप किया।

meaning: A computer that is portable and suitable for use while traveling.
definition: A computer that is portable and suitable for use while traveling.
example: Many students take notes on their laptops during lectures.
exampleHindi: कई छात्र व्याख्यान के दौरान अपने लैपटॉप पर नोट्स लेते हैं।

meaning: The screen of a desktop computer that displays images and text.
example: He plugged a second monitor into his laptop to have more screen space.
exampleHindi: अधिक स्क्रीन स्थान पाने के लिए उन्होंने अपने लैपटॉप में दूसरा मॉनिटर प्लग किया।

meaning: A small handheld device used to move a cursor on a computer screen and click on things.
example: She clicked the right mouse button to open the context menu.
exampleHindi: उसने संदर्भ मेनू खोलने के लिए दाएँ माउस बटन पर क्लिक किया।

meaning: A device that sends internet signals from your modem to your devices wirelessly or by cable.
definition: A networking device that forwards data packets between computer networks.
example: Moving the router to the centre of the house improved the Wi-Fi signal.
exampleHindi: राउटर को घर के केंद्र में ले जाने से वाई-फाई सिग्नल में सुधार हुआ।

meaning: A small, flat computer that is controlled by touching the screen.
definition: A small, flat computer that is controlled by touching the screen.
example: The school provided tablets for digital textbooks.
exampleHindi: स्कूल ने डिजिटल पाठ्यपुस्तकों के लिए टैबलेट उपलब्ध कराए।
